errors.terminalError: Terminal error from the connected computer.
errors.protocolError: Protocol error from the connected computer.
errors.readOnlySession: This session is not interactive right now.

messages.title: Agent Messages
messages.emptyText: Approval, failure, and completion messages from Codex, Claude Code, and other Agents will appear here.
messages.targetUnavailable: Could not open the linked session
messages.deleteSelectedMessage: This only removes them from this app inbox.

reason.missing_session_id: This message has no linked session.
reason.session_not_found: The linked session no longer exists or has not synced to the app.
reason.session_unavailable: The linked session cannot be opened right now.

devices.emptyText: Add a Desktop link to start using OmniWork.

share.title: Share {{deviceName}}
share.description: Scan this QR code on another OmniWork app to import the same Desktop link.
share.warning: Anyone with this QR code can import the pairing key. Share it only with devices you trust.

validation.invalidKeyMessage: Enter the 32-character key generated by your computer.
validation.missingDetailsMessage: Relay URL and device ID are required.
validation.invalidQrMessage: The scanned pairing key is not valid.

scan.title: Scan the Desktop QR code
scan.text: Scan the QR code shown on your computer. OmniWork will import the Relay URL, device ID, and temporary key automatically.

web.title: Paste the Desktop details
web.text: Web runs as a single-page app and does not use camera scanning. Paste the Desktop details, or open a shared encrypted link and enter its 4-digit password.

encrypted.title: Encrypted pairing link
encrypted.description: Enter the 4-digit password shown with the shared QR code or link.
encrypted.invalidPassword: Could not decrypt this pairing link. Check the password or ask for a fresh link.

language.title: Language
language.hint: Choose the display language for this app.

terminalFontSize.title: Terminal font size
terminalFontSize.hint: Controls the terminal text size on this device.

connection.title: Connection
connection.hint: Control when Direct or Relay paths are used.

agentNotifications.title: Agent notifications
agentNotifications.hint: Covers approvals, failures, and waiting-for-input messages. No extra setup is required.

security.title: Security
security.hint: Protect the app with a local gesture passcode.

intro.title: Enable gesture passcode
intro.description: Set a 3 * 3 gesture passcode. The app asks for it on cold start and after the auto-lock timeout.

setup.title: Set Gesture Passcode
setup.subtitle: Use one continuous stroke that is easy for you to repeat.
setup.mismatch: Gestures do not match. Set it again.

reset.title: Reset gesture passcode?
reset.description: The gesture passcode cannot be recovered. Resetting clears this app's security settings and saved Mac pairing information. You will need to scan the pairing QR code again.
reset.authDescription: Saved Desktop pairing information will be cleared after verification.
reset.unavailableDescription: System authentication is unavailable on this device. To protect saved connection keys, uninstall and reinstall the app, then pair again.
reset.cancelledDescription: Device verification was not completed. The gesture passcode and pairing information were kept.
reset.successDescription: Pair your Desktop again and set a new gesture passcode if needed.
reset.pairingMessage: Scan again or enter the Desktop pairing details.

unavailable.title: Security settings unavailable
unavailable.description: The local gesture lock settings cannot be read. Retry before continuing to avoid bypassing app security.

settings.title: Security Settings
settings.switchHint: When enabled, the app requires the gesture passcode on cold start and timeout resume.

connectionPreference.title: Connection mode
connectionPreference.description: Choose how OmniWork connects to your Desktop. Direct means session payload data is not carried by relay after the direct link is ready. Relay can help when networks block a direct path; the setting is saved on this device and reconnects immediately.

auto.label: Auto
auto.hint: Recommended. Prefer direct, use relay when needed.

prefer_p2p.label: Direct only
prefer_p2p.hint: No relay carries session payload after direct link is ready.

relay_only.label: Relay only
relay_only.hint: Use relay path only. Session data remains encrypted.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.empty: No workspaces from this Desktop yet.
workspaces.noSessions: No sessions in this workspace yet.

provider.otherSummary: Existing tmux sessions that do not match a configured Terminal provider

files.title: {{workspace}} Files
files.tooLarge: File is too large to preview ({{size}}).

editor.unsavedMessage: This file has unsaved changes. Going back will discard them.
editor.conflictMessage: The remote file changed after it was opened. Reload the remote version or manually preserve your edits.
editor.localCopiedMessage: The current editor content has been copied to the clipboard.
editor.reloadConfirmMessage: Reloading will replace the current editor content with the remote file. Copy your local edits first to avoid losing them.
editor.saveFailedMessage: This file could not be saved. Check permissions or reload and try again.
editor.reloadRequiredMessage: This file is missing a save baseline, so remote conflicts cannot be checked safely. Reload before editing and saving.
editor.contentUnavailableMessage: The editor did not return the latest content. Try again before saving or viewing changes.
editor.riskSaveMessage: This file or change looks sensitive. Review the diff before saving unless you are sure.

blockReason.missing: The file has not finished loading.
blockReason.unsupported_type: This file type is outside the project's supported text file list.
blockReason.too_large: This file is too large and is read-only.

git.title: {{workspace}} Git
git.noRepositoryHint: Git tools only appear for workspaces inside a Git repository.
git.untrackedNoDiff: Untracked files are listed here, but no diff is available until they are staged or tracked.

fileContent.unsupported: This file type cannot be read in the Git preview.
fileContent.tooLarge: File is too large to preview ({{size}}).

terminal.composerPlaceholder: Ask {{terminalProvider}} to inspect, edit, test, or explain...
terminal.moveFloatingControls: Long press and drag terminal controls vertically
